name: Shaker Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture forms a soft ball when dropped into cold water.
3. Remove from heat and spread on a buttered platter.
4. Allow to cool until firm enough to handle.
5. Grease hands with additional butter if needed.
6. Gently pull the taffy using both hands, twisting as you go for an attractive finish.
7. Two people are recommended for this step.
8. Once cooled, cut into pieces and wrap in waxed paper.
